root_cause: Workload readiness recovered 8.5 minutes after Service 'orders-db' recovered, indicating dependency-coupled recovery delay
evidence: Container 'api' references Service 'orders-db' in workload configuration
Dependency pod 'orders-db-0' for Service 'orders-db' became Ready at 2026-01-15T10:10:00+00:00
Readiness failures for container 'api' continued after dependency recovery until the pod became Ready at 2026-01-15T10:18:30+00:00
Workload recovery lag after dependency recovery was 8.5 minutes
Observed 7 dependency-related failure occurrence(s) and 3 post-recovery readiness failure occurrence(s) in the incident window

causes.message: Container 'api' is configured to depend on Service 'orders-db'
Service 'orders-db' recovered before the workload became Ready
Workload readiness remained degraded after dependency recovery, indicating reconnect or health-check recovery is tightly coupled to the upstream service
The pod recovered only after a prolonged lag following dependency restoration

pod:checkout-api-6c8d97d77b-9km2q: Pod Ready transition happened 8.5 minutes after Service 'orders-db' recovered
container:api: Readiness probe failed: dependency orders-db.default.svc.cluster.local unavailable: dial tcp 10.96.41.22:5432: connect: connection refused
Readiness probe failed: dependency orders-db.default.svc.cluster.local unavailable: dial tcp 10.96.41.22:5432: i/o timeout
service:orders-db: Service currently has ready backends after dependency pod 'orders-db-0' recovered at 2026-01-15T10:10:00+00:00
pod:orders-db-0: Dependency pod became Ready before the dependent workload recovered (2026-01-15T10:10:00+00:00 -> 2026-01-15T10:18:30+00:00)

likely_causes: Application readiness depends too directly on upstream dependency health instead of degrading gracefully while reconnecting
Connection pools, retry backoff, or circuit-breaker state delayed recovery after the dependency itself was already healthy
Health checks keep reporting NotReady until downstream sessions are rebuilt, which prolongs recovery after service restoration
suggested_checks: Review readiness endpoint behavior, reconnect backoff, and dependency retry settings so recovery tracks upstream restoration more closely
